# FoodDonar

> FoodDonar connects donors, NGOs, and volunteers to redistribute surplus food in real time, reducing waste and feeding communities.

FoodDonar is a social-impact platform with a unified dashboard for four roles (Donor, NGO, Volunteer, Admin). It uses GPS matching, AI-powered spoilage prediction, and live tracking to move surplus food from where it is to where it's needed.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mission, live impact stats, and how the platform works.
- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Email + password authentication for all roles.
- [Onboarding](/onboarding): Quick walkthrough of the platform for new users.
- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Request a password-reset email.

## Optional

- [Reset password](/reset-password): Complete password reset (link from email).
